license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.gg4btyw
title: Staining protocol for unicellular protists: Lysotracker and Dapi

steps_raw.instruction: 2% PFA Fixation: Add PFA drop by drop and mixing carefully into 1mL cells for a final concentration of 2%PFA
Incubate cells for 4 min at room temperature 00:04:00
Add 1/1000 lysotracker dye: 1 uL of lysotracker for a 1mL final Volume of cells. Room temperature, protect from light.
Incubate for 20 min. Room temperature, protect from light. 00:20:00
Add 1/1000 DAPI dye. Room temperature, protect from light.
Incubate for 5 minutes. Room temperature, protect from light. 00:05:00 Total incubation times: Lysotracker: 25min DAPI: 5min
Centrifuge at 1000g for 5 minutes and resuspend with 1xPBS 00:05:00
Mount your slide and ready for observation!
